гҖҖгҖҖMegan Thee Stallion: In Her Words offers unprecedented access to the multi-faceted woman behind the persona. Follow the Houston nativeвҖҷs journey on the road to stardom as she tenaciously navigates fame, grief, pressure and success. The documentary unpacks MeganвҖҷs most vulnerable moments in a powerful way that allows fans to meet the real Megan Pete.
this_title: Megan Thee Stallion: In Her Words
